name: Crab Rangoon II
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream cheese at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crabmeat, garlic powder, and Worstershire sauce together in a bowl and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Place one teaspoon of the mixture on a wonton wrapper.
3. Moisten the edges with egg yolk and fold the wrapper in half to form a triangle.
4. Fold the two furthermost points under so you have something resembling a little bird (optional).
5. Heat oil to 350°F in a wok.
6. Deep fry the wontons for 2-3 minutes, turning once until golden brown.
7. Enjoy! They are delicious!
